26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @nicilaskin made this necklace and i want one! so cute. check out their other posts for more awesomeness
27 Man Tax: Anthony Rapp
“Every strike brings me closer to the next home run.” - Babe Ruth So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Spring Clean [OC]
item.description: BONUS panel (and loads more!) for patrons! https://www.patreon.com/litterboxcomics Bonus panels are only possible thanks to the support of my wonderful patrons! I know not everyone can afford to support, which is why bonuses become free a year later when I repost!

item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Oh. I edited it to be more accurate of how I felt at the time. Last November. So def not now. When I was very much saying fuck it to everything and everyone and giving up in that way. And then someone actually gave into my insanity and crazy ideas... iz fun now.
The cute shoes tho.
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk
